description: Abrdn Healthcare Opportunities Fund is a closed ended balanced mutual fund launched and managed by abrdn Inc. The fund invests in public equity and fixed income markets across the globe. It seeks to invest in securities of companies operating in the healthcare sector. The fund also invests in pooled investment vehicles. For its fixed income portion, the fund invests in corporate debt securities across the credit rating spectrum. It benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the S&P 1500 Healthcare Index and S&P 500 Index. Abrdn Healthcare Opportunities Fund was formed on April 2, 2014
mos_flag: NO — yield does not compensate for business risk
